analysis.summary: A woman showcases a budget-friendly body shaper that gives an instant hourglass figure, demonstrating its effect with loose jeans and highlighting its price.
analysis.music: Upbeat pop music with a female vocal and electronic elements.

timeline.visual: A woman in a beige body shaper and jeans pulls the waistband of her jeans away from her body to show the cinched waist, looking surprised.

The woman again pulls the waistband of her jeans away from her body, then stretches the fabric of the body shaper to demonstrate its elasticity and shaping effect.
The woman raises her arms in excitement, then touches her chest, looking pleased.
The woman blows a kiss, then poses again, pulling her jeans to show the waist, ending the video.

analysis.hook: The way it's fitting and snatching my waist insane.
analysis.summary: A woman demonstrates the effectiveness of a budget-friendly shapewear bodysuit by showcasing its waist-snatching and smoothing effects under a bodycon dress, comparing the look with and without the shapewear.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: The way it's fitting and snatching my waist insane.
timeline.visual: Woman in a black shapewear bodysuit, holding a small microphone, posing and gesturing to her waist.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: Girls, I know you all are so excited to wear that's cute hot bodycon dresses,
timeline.visual: Woman in a blue oversized t-shirt and jeans, holding a small microphone, gesturing.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: but bodycon dresses shows everything. So, as a cool girl don't gatekeep, I'll tell you what exactly I wear under.
timeline.visual: Woman in a blue oversized t-shirt and jeans, holding a small microphone, gesturing. Two small picture-in-picture videos appear showing women in bodycon dresses with visible stomach areas (0:08-0:09).

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: Now it's time to wear a bodycon dress. I'm literally wearing the Invokes body shaper right now and you can clearly see.
timeline.visual: Woman in black shapewear bodysuit (0:09-0:10), then transitions to wearing a black bodycon dress over the shapewear (0:10-0:13), holding a small microphone, posing and gesturing to her waist.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: Like nothing is there. Ah! What else we need, girls?
timeline.visual: Woman in black bodycon dress, holding a small microphone, posing and gesturing.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: So this is how my body looks without Invokes body shaper.
timeline.visual: Woman in black bodycon dress, posing sideways, showing a slightly less snatched waist, then turns to face the camera.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: If you don't want to show your tummy after having so much food at your date,
timeline.visual: Woman in black bodycon dress, holding a small microphone, gesturing.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: trust me, you need to have the body shaper in your wardrobe. Thanks, me later. Bye!
timeline.visual: Woman in black bodycon dress, holding a small microphone, gesturing and holding up the shapewear at the end.

analysis.hook: आज मैं स्पेसिफिकली बात करने आई हूं एडहेसिव स्टिक ऑन ब्रा के बारे में
analysis.summary: A woman demonstrates how to properly use an adhesive stick-on bra, showing its application and how it looks under a halter-neck dress.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: आज मैं स्पेसिफिकली बात करने आई हूं एडहेसिव स्टिक ऑन ब्रा के बारे में
timeline.visual: A woman in a red floral dress holds two black bra cups, talking to the camera.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: जिसके बहुत पर निकल आए हैं हां दिस इज एग्जैक्टली व्हाट आई एम वेयरिंग अंडर दिस ड्रेस आल्सो
timeline.visual: The woman continues to hold the bra cups, then gestures to her chest area.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: कैसे बीच में क्लास आता है और ये ऊपर से निकल जाता है
timeline.visual: The woman demonstrates how the two bra cups connect and disconnect with a clasp in the middle.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: आप अपने बुज़ामिया को लेंगी, आप उसको थोड़ा लिफ्ट करेंगी, इसके ऊपर ये पेस्ट करेंगी
timeline.visual: The woman holds one bra cup and gestures how to apply it to lift the breast.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: एंड देन यू मेक श्योर द एज यू यूज टू लिफ्ट द एंटायर बुज़ामिया अप रिपीट द सेम ऑन द अदर बूब आल्सो
timeline.visual: The woman demonstrates applying the bra cup to her chest, emphasizing lifting, then gestures to repeat on the other side.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: टुडेस ड्रेस इन क्वेश्चन इज दिस गॉर्जियस ऑक्स ब्लड के पीछे है चेन्स आगे है हॉल्टर व्हिच मीन्स आपको कुछ ना कुछ एडहेसिव स्टिक ऑन ब्रा टाइप का या
timeline.visual: The woman holds up a maroon halter-neck dress with chain details, explaining its design.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: कॉमा बनियाप्स या रेगुलर बनियाप्स पहनने पड़ेंगे
timeline.visual: The woman continues holding the maroon dress, discussing bra options for such a style.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: मैं पहनूंगी ये बहुत पर निकल आए वाले एडहेसिव स्टिक ऑन ब्रा इसके नीचे
timeline.visual: The woman holds the two black bra cups again, stating she will wear them under the dress.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: एंड दिस इज व्हाट इट लुक्स लाइक विथ द हील्स आई एम वेयरिंग द एडहेसिव स्टिक ऑन ब्रा वन मिनट स्टैंडिंग ओवेशन टू द ड्रेस
timeline.visual: The woman is now wearing the maroon halter-neck dress, posing and showing the full outfit with heels.

timeline.voiceover_verbatim: व्हाट अ गॉर्जियस ड्रेस दैट इज इट फ्रॉम दिस एपिसोड ऑफ़ व्हाटएवर द हेल दिस वाज़
timeline.visual: The woman continues to pose in the maroon dress, expressing admiration for it, and concludes the video.

1369097325110186.body:
Behind Closed Doors with Fynd
Did you know your underwear has an expiration date?
Most women are surprised to learn that gynecologists recommend replacing your intimate wear every 6 months. Why? Because even with regular washing, bacterial growth is a real concern, especially when dealing with tight fabrics and high-compression shapewear.
At Krvvy, education comes before the sale. We’re vocal about the “12-15 hour rule” recommending a limit on how long you should wear compression garments to prioritize your health. From choosing the right breathable fabrics to understanding the specific use case for every level of compression, we’re changing how India thinks about intimate wellness.
Full episode with Yash, co-founder & CEO of Krvvy, is on YouTube now. Ep 26.
How often do you actually refresh your intimate wear drawer? Be honest! 👇
.
.
.
@yashg_2 @staykrvvy @raginnivarma
#intimatewellness #womenshealth #d2cindia #businesspodcast #shapewear

1826206971687574.body:
Behind Closed Doors with Fynd
Jockey has been in India for 30 years.
More distribution than almost any apparel brand. A supply chain that most D2C founders can only dream about. 
And Krvvy’s co-founder says: they have been ignoring half the country. ‘Jockey’s sizing is S, M, L, XL. That’s it. That is not a whole country of Indian women. I want their distribution model. I want to study and implement what they built. And then I’m adding inclusive assortment. That’s the takeover.’ 
Is he right? Or is this founder bravado? Agree or disagree — comment below.
@yashg_2 @staykrvvy @raginnivarma 
.
.
.
